strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, aligning with required AI skills
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development, demonstrating initiative and architectural depth
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) vs. candidate name (Aisha Okonkwo), raising red flag for authenticity
Lack of explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — key required stack components
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially hindering collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep full-stack expertise, strong open-source contributions, and direct AI-agent experience that strongly align with the role — but the severe inconsistency between the named candidate (Aisha Okonkwo) and all online profiles (Szabo Bogdan) raises serious concerns about resume authenticity and professionalism, which outweighs technical strengths.
